reasoning: User asked for cherry-blossom spots in Tohoku (Spanish). The tool dump returns generic Wikidata Akita entries dominated by shrines, kofun, and local museums with no sakura signal. Names/coords look real but they don't address the intent.
missing_data: Famous Tohoku sakura spots (Kakunodate, Hirosaki Park, Kitakami Tenshochi) and bloom-season metadata.
improvement_hint: Add a theme/keyword filter (e.g. theme='cherry_blossom' or seasonal tag) so get_spots can prioritize known hanami sites instead of arbitrary Wikidata entities.

reasoning: User wanted Niigata sake breweries. Tool returned MAFF GI items (chamame, snow-buried carrots, lotus root) — accurate but unrelated. No breweries listed. Data quality is high but topic-mismatched.
missing_data: Major Niigata sake breweries (Hakkaisan, Kubota/Asahi Shuzo, Hakurakusei/Niigata Meijo, Kakurei). GI Sake of Niigata designation.
improvement_hint: Add a 'sake' or 'brewery' subcategory and surface the GI 'Niigata Sake' designation; route brewery queries to a dedicated tool or include sake_brewery POIs.

reasoning: Query asks for Hakuba ski resorts with onsen (French). Returned 6 spots, mostly municipal-office pages and a museum/garden. No ski resorts and no onsen surfaced despite Hakuba being famous for both.
missing_data: Hakuba Happo-One, Hakuba Goryu, Hakuba47 ski resorts; Happo-no-yu, Mimizuku-no-yu onsen.
improvement_hint: Boost feature-tagged POIs (ski_resort, onsen) over generic municipal nav pages; lower quality_score for items lacking real description.

reasoning: User wants best Kansai autumn-foliage spots; result lists random Kyoto Wikidata entries (kofun groups, sports ground, disaster prevention center) with no foliage relevance. Data exists but is unranked for momiji.
missing_data: Tofuku-ji, Eikan-do, Arashiyama, Kibune, Kiyomizu-dera, Mt Koya autumn spots.
improvement_hint: Add a seasonal-theme filter (autumn_foliage) or a curated POI tag layer that promotes well-known momiji destinations.

reasoning: Arabic query asks for Kansai cherry-blossom spots. Nara result is dominated by kofun and folk museums; Yoshino, Nara Park, Mt Wakakusa absent. Intent unmet.
missing_data: Mt Yoshino (Yoshinoyama), Nara Park, Kasuga Taisha sakura, Heijo Palace, Mii-dera (Shiga) etc.
improvement_hint: Surface seasonal landmark POIs via a sakura tag/keyword; demote irrelevant kofun/museum entries when query intent is hanami.

reasoning: User asks about stargazing on Okinawa remote islands (Japanese). Result returned mainland Okinawa castles, museums, archaeological sites — none of Iriomote, Hateruma, Ishigaki, Yonaguni dark-sky spots appear.
missing_data: Iriomote-Ishigaki National Park (international dark-sky park), Hateruma-jima, Kohama-jima, Taketomi.
improvement_hint: Allow filtering by remote-island municipality codes; add 'dark_sky' or 'astronomy' POI tags.

reasoning: Thai query asks for rural onsen ryokan in Hokkaido. Top results are Sapporo business hotels (ANA Holiday Inn, ANA Crowne Plaza) and Niseko apartments — neither rural nor onsen. Hotel data is real but constraint-mismatched.
missing_data: Rural onsen ryokan in Noboribetsu, Jozankei, Sounkyo, Akan, Tokachigawa, Lake Toya, Niseko Konbu Onsen.
improvement_hint: Add hotel_type filter (ryokan/onsen_ryokan) and a rural/non-urban flag based on population density or land-use class.

reasoning: Vietnamese query about worth-visiting Seto Inland Sea islands. Kagawa is the right prefecture but results emphasize generic museums and a saltwork ruin — Naoshima/Teshima/Shodoshima art islands are conspicuously absent in shown sample.
missing_data: Naoshima, Teshima, Inujima, Shodoshima, Megijima, Ogijima — Setouchi Triennale islands and ferry info.
improvement_hint: Add an 'island' POI type tag and surface Setouchi Triennale venues; consider a dedicated get_islands tool.

reasoning: User wants indigo-dye workshops in Tokushima. Tool surfaces Awa Shijira (cotton-indigo weave) and Awa Washi (indigo-dyed paper) — relevant designations. But only 3 official crafts; no workshop venues, addresses, or booking info, and Awa Ai (indigo) itself is non-METI.
missing_data: Aizumi Historical Museum, Furusho Senko (workshop), Buaisou, hands-on dyeing experiences, addresses.
improvement_hint: Layer a 'workshop/experience' POI dataset on top of MAFF/METI designations so craft queries surface actual visitor venues.

reasoning: German query for Mt Koya shukubo. Returned hotels are in Tanabe, Wakayama City, Kushimoto, Shirahama — all far from Koyasan. No temple lodging surfaced despite Koyasan having ~50 famous shukubo.
missing_data: Eko-in, Fukuchi-in, Henjoson-in, Kongobu-ji area shukubo on Mt Koya (Koyasan).
improvement_hint: Add type='shukubo' or 'temple_lodging' filter and tag Mt Koya temples; allow municipality='高野町' subqueries for Koyasan.

reasoning: User wants samurai districts outside Kyoto. search_area returned 92 hits including Aizu Bukeyashiki (Fukushima), Uchiyama Residence (Fukui), Nagamachi (Kanazawa) — all relevant. But results are interleaved with unrelated Saga/Kyoto chrome and the asked 'outside Kyoto' constraint isn't enforced.
missing_data: Kakunodate, Hagi, Chiran, Izushi, Kitsuki samurai districts.
improvement_hint: Strip nav-chrome descriptions and add a negative-constraint filter (exclude prefecture=Kyoto) when intent says 'outside X'.

reasoning: Indonesian query asks for Akita summer festivals. Returned 3 Akita festivals (Dainichido Bugaku, Kakunodate Matsuri, Tsuchizaki Shinmei) — relevant but Kakunodate/Dainichido are not summer. National_heritage list also drags in non-Akita items (Kawagoe, Iga, Kamezaki). No date metadata.
missing_data: Akita Kanto Matsuri, Omagari Hanabi (national fireworks), Nishimonai Bon Odori — clearly summer, well-known.
wrong_data: national_heritage section includes non-Akita festivals which can mislead.
improvement_hint: Add a season/month field; for prefecture queries, scope national_heritage strictly to that prefecture or label scope clearly.

reasoning: Korean query for small port towns in San'in. Shimane result lists castles, kofun and museums — none are fishing villages. Mihonoseki, Hamada, Yunotsu absent.
missing_data: Mihonoseki, Yunotsu, Tomogaura, Hamada, Hinomisaki port villages.
improvement_hint: Tag POIs with 'fishing_port' or 'coastal_village'; add a coastal/inland classifier.

reasoning: Query for washi-making experiences in Gifu. Tool returned 9 METI crafts including ceramics and lacquer; Mino washi/Mino paper not visible in shown excerpt. Designations are accurate but lack workshop/visitor venue info.
missing_data: Mino Washi (本美濃紙, METI), Mino Washi-no-Sato Kaikan, hands-on papermaking workshops, addresses.
improvement_hint: Surface paper-making experience venues alongside designations; for category=craft queries, prioritize items matching keyword (washi).

reasoning: Spanish query about Noto Peninsula fishing villages. Ishikawa results center on Kanazawa museums; only Wajima/Suzu peripheral hits and no fishing villages (Sosogi, Wajima Asaichi area, Mawaki) prominently surfaced.
missing_data: Wajima Asaichi, Sosogi, Shiroyone Senmaida-area villages, Suzu fishing hamlets.

reasoning: Query asks for sand dunes beyond Tottori. search_area found 84 hits but top results dominated by Tottori itself plus unrelated Saga/Yamagata nav pages. Lesser-known dunes like Nakatajima (Shizuoka), Sarugamori (Aomori), Niigata's Niigata Sand Dunes not surfaced in excerpt.
missing_data: Nakatajima (Hamamatsu), Sarugamori, Fukiage Hama (Kagoshima), Uchinada (Ishikawa), Niigata Sakyu.
improvement_hint: Honor 'not X' phrasing by demoting Tottori results; tag dune POIs explicitly so non-Tottori dunes rank up.

reasoning: Chinese query for San'in traditional crafts; Shimane response lists 4 METI-designated crafts (Iwami-yaki, Sekishu Washi, Unshu Soroban, Izumo Stone Lanterns) with full Chinese descriptions and source URLs. Solid, on-topic, trustworthy. Tottori not covered though — San'in includes both prefectures.
missing_data: Tottori crafts (Inshu Washi, Yumihama Kasuri) — San'in spans Tottori+Shimane.
improvement_hint: Allow region='San-in' (multi-prefecture) shorthand to combine Shimane+Tottori results in one call.

reasoning: User asks for lavender fields in Hokkaido beyond Furano. Result lists Jomon archaeological sites, Ainu Museum, folk museums; only Kamifurano Folk Museum is even Furano-adjacent. No actual lavender farms surfaced.
missing_data: Farm Tomita, Saika no Sato, Hokusei-no-Oka Lavender Park (Kamifurano), Choei Lavender Farm (Nakafurano).
improvement_hint: Tag flower-field/farm POIs and accept theme='lavender'; respect 'beyond X' negation by re-ranking.

reasoning: Tagalog query 'traditional coffee towns in Kyushu' (likely intent: traditional towns; coffee may be mistranslation). Oita result returns shrines, kofun museums, Nakatsu Castle — not traditional townscapes. Yufuin, Hita Mameda-machi, Kitsuki not surfaced.
missing_data: Hita Mameda-machi, Kitsuki castle town, Yufuin, Usuki preserved townscape.

reasoning: User asks for kominka stays in Hokuriku (Japanese). Ishikawa hotel result returns student housing, AB Hotel, ANA Crowne Plaza, generic guest houses — no kominka/machiya lodging. Type filter not honored.
missing_data: Kominka stays in Kanazawa Higashi-Chaya, Wajima, Notojima; brands like Sankaido, Nipponia, Kayanoya.
wrong_data: name=null entries (Student housing 1) shouldn't appear as travel options.
improvement_hint: Add hotel_type filter (kominka/machiya/ryokan); drop entries with null name + null website from traveler-facing output.

reasoning: User asks for mountain shrines on Kii Peninsula. Tool returned 7 Wakayama Japan Heritage stories — only 'Living with Whales' shown, which is coastal/whale-themed not mountain shrines. Kumano Sanzan and Koyasan stories likely in remaining 6 but not visible.
missing_data: Kumano Sanzan (Hongu/Hayatama/Nachi Taisha), Koyasan, Yoshino-Omine sacred sites, Mt Tamaki shrine; Mie/Nara Kii portion.

reasoning: Query for summer fireworks along Sea-of-Japan coast. Niigata festivals count=0; national_heritage fallback lists Akita/Saitama/Toyama/Mie/Aichi festivals — none are Niigata fireworks. Nagaoka Hanabi, one of Japan's three great fireworks, missing entirely.
missing_data: Nagaoka Matsuri Daihanabi, Kashiwazaki Marine Fireworks, Niigata Matsuri Hanabi.

improvement_hint: Add a fireworks (hanabi taikai) dataset; scope national_heritage strictly to the requested prefecture or relabel as 'related elsewhere'.

reasoning: Query about Oita bamboo crafts. Tool returned Beppu Takezaiku (Beppu Bamboo Crafts) — exact match — plus Hakata Ori (cross-prefecture). Designation, production area, history all correct and useful.
missing_data: Beppu Takezaiku Densan Center / workshops + experience venues.

reasoning: User asks about cycling routes in rural Shikoku. Ehime result lists kofun, Yuzuki Castle Museum, Imabari Castle — Shimanami Kaido (the world-famous cycling route from Imabari) not surfaced as such, no route data.

reasoning: User wants regional kabuki venues outside Tokyo/Kyoto. Tool returned 183 traditional arts items — Nogaku, Kifune Matsuri, Okumakabuto, Kawagoe Hikawa — none are kabuki venues. No filter on art form, no venue/location bias.
missing_data: Kanamaru-za (Kotohira, Kagawa), Korakukan (Akita), Eirakukan (Hyogo), Uchiko-za (Ehime) — surviving rural kabuki theaters; rural ji-kabuki troupes.
